```{=html}
<div style="width:92%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.6em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.7em;">

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;">
   <div style="width:3em;height:3em;border-radius:0.8em;background:#FFFFFF;border:1.5px solid #D9D4DF;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#6F6470;box-shadow:0 6px 16px rgba(44,62,80,0.1);"><i data-lucide="user-round" style="width:1.3em;height:1.3em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;font-weight:700;color:#6F6470;">You</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.4em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.3;text-align:center;">a loose<br>prompt</div>
  </div>

  <i data-lucide="arrow-right" style="width:1.2em;height:1.2em;stroke-width:2.2;color:#B5A78F;flex-shrink:0;"></i>

  <div style="position:relative;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;background:#FFFBF3;border:1.5px solid #FAE9C8;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(196,136,26,0.18);">
   <div style="position:absolute;top:-0.65em;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:linear-gradient(135deg,#C4881A,#E0A93A);color:#FFFFFF;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.38em;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:0.2em 0.6em;border-radius:999px;white-space:nowrap;">master agent</div>
   <div style="width:3em;height:3em;border-radius:0.8em;background:#FBEEE8;border:1px solid #EAC6B6;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-top:0.3em;"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#CC785C" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:1.3em;height:1.3em;"><path d="M17.3041 3.541h-3.6718l6.696 16.918H24Zm-10.6082 0L0 20.459h3.7442l1.3693-3.5527h7.0052l1.3693 3.5528h3.7442L10.5363 3.5409Zm-.3712 10.2232 2.2914-5.9456 2.2914 5.9456Z"/></svg></div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;">Claude Code</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.4em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.3;text-align:center;">enhances the<br>prompt · reviews</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.15em;flex-shrink:0;">
   <i data-lucide="arrow-right" style="width:1.2em;height:1.2em;stroke-width:2.2;color:#B5A78F;"></i>
   <i data-lucide="arrow-left" style="width:1.2em;height:1.2em;stroke-width:2.2;color:#C7C1E5;"></i>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.38em;color:#9B8EA0;">loop</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #C9DCF7;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(66,133,244,0.16);">
   <div style="width:3em;height:3em;border-radius:0.8em;background:#EAF1FE;border:1px solid #C9DCF7;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#4285F4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:1.3em;height:1.3em;"><path d="M11.04 19.32Q12 21.51 12 24q0-2.49.93-4.68.96-2.19 2.58-3.81t3.81-2.55Q21.51 12 24 12q-2.49 0-4.68-.93a12.3 12.3 0 0 1-3.81-2.58 12.3 12.3 0 0 1-2.58-3.81Q12 2.49 12 0q0 2.49-.96 4.68-.93 2.19-2.55 3.81a12.3 12.3 0 0 1-3.81 2.58Q2.49 12 0 12q2.49 0 4.68.96 2.19.93 3.81 2.55t2.55 3.81"/></svg></div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;font-weight:700;color:#3A7DC9;">Gemini</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.4em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.3;text-align:center;">generates<br>the image</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:1.1em;text-align:center;font-size:0.52em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">
  No model is good at everything. Your master agent keeps your <strong style="color:#C4881A;">context</strong>; a specialist handles the one task it is weak at. <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#5654A2;background:#EEEDF8;padding:0.05em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">/ph-image</code> does exactly this.
 </div>

</div>
```
